hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '(^|/)(\.env(\..+)?|.+\.key|.+\.pem|secrets\..+|credentials\..+)$' && { echo 'pre-commit: refusing to commit potential secrets (.env / *.key / *.pem / secrets.* / credentials.*)' >&2; exit 1; } || exit 0

git diff --cached -U0 | grep -E '^\+' | grep -iE '(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token|bearer)["'\'']?\s*[:=]\s*["'\''][A-Za-z0-9_\-]{16,}' && { echo 'pre-commit: refusing to commit content that looks like an embedded credential' >&2; exit 1; } || exit 0
